title: iguanura piahensis
intro: Iguanura piahensis, also known as the Borneo walking palm, is a type of plant species belonging to the family Arecaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Iguanura piahensis include the potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve blood sugar control, and reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease. Traditionally, the plant has been used to prepare herbal remedies, such as extracts and infusions, which are used to treat various ailments.
